base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_medusa_idle — a character (boss) from 1986 castlevania. Medusa upper-body — 2-frame hair-serpent-writhe. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Medusa upper-body — 2-frame hair-serpent-writhe; boss of Level 2 Main Hall. Spawns Medusa-heads as projectiles + spits stone-gaze beam
